prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Use current Opus pricing from the Anthropic pricing page. In an agent session the

risks_fired.evidence: Three sequential calculation tasks may prompt a brief narration before the math.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Optional body primer after the fence; not blocking.

risks_overturned.why_overturned: Premise false. Claude Code has WebFetch. The pricing page was fetched live 2026-06-03 and returns current Opus rates (4.5-4.8 all $5 input / $0.50 cache read / $6.25 5m write / $25 output). 'Use current Opus pricing from the Anthropic pricing page' is a valid, fulfillable instruction, not a phantom fetch. No compendium asserts no-internet access; the no-browser claim was a judge hallucination. See check_platform_and_boundaries.md S4 (trust-but-verify the capability-check agent: WebFetch the URL yourself when the assertion is load-bearing).
